movie.actors: Michael Jai White, John Leguizamo, Martin Sheen, Theresa Randle
movie.plot: An elite mercenary is killed, but comes back from Hell as a reluctant soldier of the Devil.
movie.title: Spawn
movie.writer: Todd McFarlane (comic book), Alan B. McElroy (screen story), Mark A.Z. Dippé (screen story), Alan B. McElroy (screenplay)
